services.name: HappyVertical email
services.auth: Per account; credentials stay in Warden or local environment.

cli.notes: Verify reachability and authenticated account access with available browser, connector, or local session.
Use approved Warden access or local secret integration; never print secret values.

services.name: Vikunja
services.auth: Per-account API token from Warden/local environment.

cli.notes: The official Vikunja CLI is for server/container administration; have-config provides hv-hermes-vikunja-task-updates for notification polling.

services.name: Stoat
services.auth: Per-account credentials when legacy Stoat access is explicitly needed.

cli.notes: Zulip at https://chat.happyvertical.com is the current primary chat path.

services.name: Zulip
services.purpose: Primary team chat and agent-response channel
services.auth: Per-agent Zulip account API credentials from Warden/local environment.

cli.notes: Hermes gateway adapters should use Zulip /api/v1/register and /api/v1/events long polling with platforms.zulip.enabled=true plus ZULIP_SITE_URL, ZULIP_EMAIL, and ZULIP_API_KEY for the per-agent Zulip account. Response readiness also needs ZULIP_ALLOWED_USERS or explicit ZULIP_ALLOW_ALL_USERS=true for default-deny authorization.

services.name: Context Forge
services.auth: Per-account or agent Context Forge access.
